/usr/bin/arm-none-eabi-ar qc librtthread_nano.a CMakeFiles/rtthread_nano.dir/src/clock.c.obj CMakeFiles/rtthread_nano.dir/src/components.c.obj CMakeFiles/rtthread_nano.dir/src/cpu.c.obj CMakeFiles/rtthread_nano.dir/src/idle.c.obj CMakeFiles/rtthread_nano.dir/src/ipc.c.obj CMakeFiles/rtthread_nano.dir/src/irq.c.obj CMakeFiles/rtthread_nano.dir/src/kservice.c.obj CMakeFiles/rtthread_nano.dir/src/mem.c.obj CMakeFiles/rtthread_nano.dir/src/memheap.c.obj CMakeFiles/rtthread_nano.dir/src/mempool.c.obj CMakeFiles/rtthread_nano.dir/src/object.c.obj CMakeFiles/rtthread_nano.dir/src/scheduler.c.obj CMakeFiles/rtthread_nano.dir/src/signal.c.obj CMakeFiles/rtthread_nano.dir/src/slab.c.obj CMakeFiles/rtthread_nano.dir/src/thread.c.obj CMakeFiles/rtthread_nano.dir/src/timer.c.obj "CMakeFiles/rtthread_nano.dir/libcpu/arm/cortex-m4/cpuport.c.obj" "CMakeFiles/rtthread_nano.dir/libcpu/arm/cortex-m4/context_gcc.S.obj" CMakeFiles/rtthread_nano.dir/components/finsh/shell.c.obj CMakeFiles/rtthread_nano.dir/components/finsh/msh.c.obj CMakeFiles/rtthread_nano.dir/components/finsh/msh_parse.c.obj CMakeFiles/rtthread_nano.dir/components/finsh/cmd.c.obj CMakeFiles/rtthread_nano.dir/components/device/device.c.obj CMakeFiles/rtthread_nano.dir/bsp/_template/cubemx_config/board.c.obj
/usr/bin/arm-none-eabi-ranlib librtthread_nano.a
